emails.subject: Premier Janitorial Services – Rate Adjustment Effective March 2026
emails.body_text:
Dear Meridian Partners Accounts Payable,

Please be advised that effective March 1, 2026, Premier Janitorial Services will be adjusting our service rates by 3% to reflect increased labor and supply costs.

Your March invoice (Month 6 of 6 under PO-2025-00051) will reflect the updated monthly rate of $2,884.00.

We appreciate your continued partnership and are happy to answer any questions.

Best regards,
Marcus Webb
Premier Janitorial Services
(773) 555-0114
m.webb@premierjanitor.com

emails.subject: Invoice SSP-2026-0031 – Summit Strategy Partners LLC
emails.body_text:
Good morning,

Please find attached invoice SSP-2026-0031 dated March 12, 2026 for $18,750.00 for consulting services rendered to Meridian Partners LLC.

Our payment terms are Net 30. Please don’t hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Thank you,
Nathan Reeves
Director of Client Services
Summit Strategy Partners LLC
(312) 555-0847
n.reeves@summitstrategy.com

emails.subject: Invoice BRC-2026-0019 – Blue Ridge Consulting Group
emails.body_text:
Hi,

Attached please find invoice BRC-2026-0019 for $5,500.00 covering Q1 2026 management consulting services for Meridian Partners.

Please process at your earliest convenience per our 2/10 Net 30 terms.

Best regards,
Patricia Yuen
Blue Ridge Consulting Group
(312) 555-0389
p.yuen@blueridgecg.com

emails.subject: Today’s Batch – March 24 – Action Needed
emails.body_text:
Joan,

Batch runs at 2pm today. Before then, please:

1. Confirm the invoices queued for PAY-2026-0324 are cleared and ready to go
2. Log any new invoices that came in today
3. Do a scan of the open holds in the ledger and let me know if anything needs attention before I run the batch

Thanks,
Tanya

Tanya Okonkwo | AP Manager
Meridian Partners, LLC
t.okonkwo@meridianpartners.com

emails.subject: Benefits Open Enrollment – Deadline April 4, 2026
emails.body_text:
Dear Team,

This is a reminder that the annual Benefits Open Enrollment period is now open. You have until April 4, 2026 to make any changes to your health, dental, and vision coverage for the upcoming plan year.

Please log into the benefits portal at hr.meridianpartners.com to review your options and confirm or update your selections.

Contact HR with any questions.

Human Resources
Meridian Partners, LLC

emails.subject: Kitchen Refrigerator Cleanout – Friday March 27
emails.body_text:
Hi everyone,

Just a heads up — the kitchen refrigerator will be cleaned out this Friday, March 27th. Please remove any personal items by end of day Thursday or they will be discarded.

Thanks for your cooperation!

Office Management
Meridian Partners, LLC

emails.subject: AP APPROVAL REQUIRED: Morrison & Webb Legal Group LLP - $3,200.00 - Invoice MW-2026-0018
emails.body_text: A non-PO invoice requires your approval before payment can be processed. Vendor: Morrison & Webb Legal Group LLP (V-00007). Invoice: MW-2026-0018, dated 2026-03-05. Amount: $3,200.00. Description: Legal services – February 2026. GL Code: 1000-300-6100. Please reply APPROVED or REJECTED with reason. If no response is received within 3 business days, the invoice will be placed on APPR hold and the vendor will be notified of the delay.

emails.subject: Invoice MW-2026-0018 – Pending Internal Approval
emails.body_text:
Dear C. Morrison,

Invoice MW-2026-0018 for $3,200.00 is currently pending internal approval. We expect to process payment within 5 additional business days. We apologize for the delay.

Meridian Partners Accounts Payable

emails.subject: Meridian Partners - Price Discrepancy on Invoice TFS-26-0089
emails.body_text:
Dear TechFlow Solutions,

We are writing regarding Invoice TFS-26-0089. Our records indicate a discrepancy between the rate on this invoice and the rate on our purchase order.

PO Rate (PO-2026-00007): $250.00/hr
Invoiced Rate: $280.00/hr
Variance: $30.00/hr

Please provide a corrected invoice or written justification for the rate difference within 5 business days.

Thank you,
J. Trevors
Accounts Payable
Meridian Partners, LLC
ap@meridianpartners.com

emails.subject: Re: Benefits Open Enrollment – Deadline April 4, 2026
emails.body_text:
Thanks for the reminder — will log in this week.

Joan

--- Original Message ---
From: hr@meridianpartners.com
Date: 2026-03-20 10:00
Subject: Benefits Open Enrollment – Deadline April 4, 2026

Dear Team,

This is a reminder that the annual Benefits Open Enrollment period is now open...

emails.subject: Re: Invoice MW-2026-0018 – Pending Internal Approval
emails.body_text:
Hi Tanya and Karen,

No response has been received on the approval request for Morrison & Webb Invoice MW-2026-0018 ($3,200.00) sent March 2nd. The 3-business-day window has elapsed. I am placing the invoice on APPR hold in the register and have notified the vendor.

Please let me know if you would like me to take any further action.

J. Trevors
Accounts Payable
Meridian Partners, LLC
